body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-5422", "cvss": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.8, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.0/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-23", "name": "Relative Path Traversal"}], "description": "A path traversal vulnerability exists in jupyter-server version 2.17.0 due to an incorrect root directory boundary check in the _get_os_path() function within jupyter_server/services/contents/fileio.py. The check uses startswith(root) without appending a trailing path separator, allowing sibling directories with names starting with the same prefix as root_dir to bypass the check. Additionally, the to_os_path() function in utils.py does not strip \"..\" from path parts, enabling traversal sequences to bypass the vulnerable check. This vulnerability can lead to unauthorized read/write access to files in sibling directories, potentially exposing sensitive data in shared hosting environments.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00437, "percentile": 0.3481}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gf7q-q4j7-hp7c", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-09T22:05:59Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gf7q-q4j7-hp7c", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gf7q-q4j7-hp7c"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-5422"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-02T10:16:25Z", "published_at": "2026-06-02T12:31:26Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-5422", "https://huntr.com/bounties/24a36953-6490-466f-8cb2-a90d1ca56e0f", "http://github.com/jupyter-server/jupyter_server/commit/0d829f2c35a481c3b24ecbe1e25a6f79954e88f2", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gf7q-q4j7-hp7c"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/jupyter-server/jupyter_server", "summary": "Jupyter Server vulnerable to Path Traversal via incorrect root directory boundary check in _get_os_path() ", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-09T22:06:00Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gf7q-q4j7-hp7c", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.18.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "jupyter-server"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 2.18.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Jupyter Server vulnerable to Path Traversal via incorrect root directory boundary check in _get_os_path()
